hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs organize jurisdiction-specific MAS compliance workflows by preserving audit trails, connecting provider outputs, and structuring evidence for regulatory review.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across disconnected evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to prepare consistent audit evidence when MAS-related workflows and provider outputs remain siloed. This fragmentation slows MAS audit readiness and creates gaps in traceability between regulatory rules and internal compliance actions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, regulatory updates, case management and decision logs into one workflow designed to support VASPs preparing consistent audit evidence for MAS compliance reviews.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to compliance evidence
workflow_description: SFTY links MAS regulatory changes with internal rule updates, provider checks, case workflows and evidence preparation for audit-ready compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY links multiple provider outputs into structured workflows, audit evidence and reporting to help VASPs prepare for MAS-specific compliance reviews efficiently.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preparing for MAS compliance audits by structuring jurisdiction-specific workflows, preserving audit evidence and enabling controlled enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for MAS audit readiness?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASPs prepare MAS audit-ready evidence by connecting multi-jurisdiction compliance workflows, regulatory rules, case management and reporting into one structured operational layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports Travel Rule by managing message routing, exception handling, linking events to cases, and preserving evidence for MAS compliance review without replacing Travel Rule providers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence including decision logs, case history, provider outputs and regulatory rule changes with traceable workflows suitable for MAS inspections and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect multiple existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected compliance workflow layer for MAS and multi-jurisdictional requirements.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace MAS compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYB, KYT or Travel Rule providers but turns their outputs into structured workflows, evidence and reports aligned with MAS compliance guidelines.
final_title: Prepare MAS audit-ready workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY structures jurisdiction-specific provider outputs into cases, evidence packages and compliance records for MAS audits.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
